name: FSPG Hi-Tech CO., Ltd.
summary: FSPG Hi-Tech CO., Ltd. manufactures and sells plastic materials in China. The company offers packaging materials, including BOPA, BOPP drinking straw and cigarette packaging materials, and laminated AL films; electric and optical materials, such as BOPP capacitor and polarizer films; and construction materials comprising woven fabrics and PE-Xc pipes. It also provides personal healthcare and clothing materials that include EasyTex breathable membranes and PE casting embossed films; advertisement and labeling materials, which comprise PVC film for graphics use. FSPG Hi-Tech CO., Ltd. is based in Foshan, China.
